text:
お帰り。
迅速な仕事ぶりで助かるよ。

ヤツらも引き返したようだけど
またやってくるだろうね……

その時はまたよろしく頼むよ。
何度現れても、ヤツらを殺し続ける。
それは変わ
Welcome back. I appreciate your quick work.

They seem to have retreated, but I'm sure it's
temporary as usual.

I'll be counting on you when they
come back. No matter how many
times they reappear, we'll keep on
killing them, just like always.
